title: Spiget Client
description: This modpack has a collection of performace and quality of life mods that are suitable for the server mcpvp.club.
body:
# Goal
This modpack brings together a selection of mods that not only provide performance but also quality of life changes that improve the PvP experience. **All mods are allowed on mcpvp.club.**
![How pvp would look like after configurating everything.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qKevIw1t/images/342584deb3fe627deafcd0866397d934d6a74949.png)
## Features
Editable GUI includes Potion HUD,Armour HUD,and Totem Counter.

The included performance mods increase FPS. Sadly it cannot save toaster pcs.

Mods like simple vc and chat notify assist in not only communicating but also improve the player experience in the hell spawn that is chat.

Flashback helps record gameplay and helps players review old matches. It is disable by default so if you would be to save a duel start recording as it starts or enable it yourselve via **mod menu**





## Updates
The modpack will be updated from 1.21.8 and 1.21.10-1.21.11 as these are the versions that have no issues on mcpvp and have the latest versions of mods.

# Notes
It is **recommended** to use an instance based launcher such as https://modrinth.com/app or https://prismlauncher.org/ if you need to use mods that aren’t allowed on certain servers. Although none of the mods are bannable in MCPVP other servers may differ. **Always** make sure to check a servers rules before joining.
